Some info since this is a modern AU ~
The Chrysos Heirs are all seen as the future of Okhema

  • Aglaea: Influential Okhema politician and partial owner of the National University.

  • Hyacine: Promising medical student from a renowned family behind Skyfolk Research.

  • Anaxagoras (Anaxa): Renowned scientist, philosopher, and researcher who reshaped global perspectives.

  • Tribbie, Trianne, and Trinnon: Top primary students; children of tech genius Tribios.

  • Phainon: Amiable, rapidly rising police officer and Mydei’s best friend, met through a university seminar/career fair.

  • Castorice: Emerging online writer gaining popularity.
